text: I am drawn forward by curiosity, compelled by the promise of innovation and inquiry radiating from the exhibition. Yet, I feel a strange detachment, as if I am both observer and subject—held slightly at bay by the layers of glass and screens separating me from what is displayed within. There is an ambiguity here, a mix of anticipation and uncertainty, as I ponder not only the meaning of R + D but also my own place within these shifting spaces of knowledge.
